resources.string: 如何使用 Lichess 比賽直播
新的一局會有跟上一局相同的成員與貢獻者

string.name: tournamentName
string.comment: This used to say "Tournament name". It is okay to continue using "Tournament", as long as you stay consistent throughout.

string.name: fullDescription
string.comment: This text used to say "Full tournament description". It can be changed to "tournament" since all broadcast events are tournaments.

string.name: fullDescriptionHelp
string.comment:
This text used to start with "Optional long description of the broadcast.". The word should be changed to "event" or "tournament" since all broadcast events are tournaments, and it is a more user-friendly term.
%1$s says "Markdown" (a proper noun) and gives a link to a description of Markdown. %2$s is the character limit (e.g. 160)

resources.string: 直播內容的詳細描述 。可以利用 %1$s。字數限於%2$s個字。
Lichess 將以該網址更新PGN數據，網址必須公開
最多 64 個以空格分開的 Lichess 棋局序號。
當地時區的錦標賽起始日期：%s
可選，如果知道比賽開始時間
刪除這局以及其所有棋局
刪除所有此輪的棋局。直播來源必須是開啟的以成功重新建立棋局。
刪除錦標賽以及所有棋局
根據比賽結果顯示玩家分數
取代玩家名字、評級、以及頭銜（選填）
訂閱以在每輪開始時獲得通知。您可以在帳戶設定中切換直播的鈴聲或推播通知。
尚無棋局。這些棋局將在對局上傳後顯示。
棋盤能夠以輸入源投放或是利用%s

string.name: iframeHelp
string.comment:
%s is 'webmasters page', which is available for translation separately.
Appears on broadcast pages for the person who set up the tournament broadcast.
This used to say "More options on the %s". It has been updated to add the leading word and a full stop.

resources.string: 將此直播嵌入您的網站

string.name: tournamentLocation
string.comment:
This used to say "Tournament location", which would still be valid, but please remain consistent with other strings.
Appears as an optional field in the broadcast creation form (https://lichess.org/broadcast/new), for a tournament that someone wishes to broadcast on Lichess.

resources.string: 由於您選擇隱藏結果，所有預覽棋盤都是空的，以避免劇透。
